_comment: Agent-facing compensation workflow. Each action is a Directus MANUAL flow triggered via POST /flows/trigger/{id} with body { collection: 'compensation_requests', keys: [<requestId>], ...inputs }. Most actions are one-click (inputs: []). A few prod flows require the operator to fill fields in Directus' manual-trigger dialog — those SAME fields are declared in `inputs` and collected by the portal (apps/agent-portal/src/features/compensation/actions.ts), then sent with the trigger, so nothing is typed in Directus. Flow IDs are identical in production and the local clone (preserved on purpose) so the portal is environment-agnostic — it targets VITE_DIRECTUS_URL. Local stand-in flows perform only the status transition, no external calls, and echo the relevant inputs back into the record. `key` values map to standin-flows.mjs's PAYLOAD table; do not rename without updating it. Input `type` mirrors the Directus field type; `kind` (in the portal's actions.ts) mirrors how it renders.

actions.label: Calculate compensation
actions.effect: status -> Calculating Compensation; fills request_frequency + suggested_compensation_value

actions.label: Generate coupon
actions.effect: status -> Generating Coupon; sets coupon_code from input (PROD: calls Yiji CreateCoupon, creates Com_Coupons row, links it)

actions.label: Assign coupon
actions.effect: status -> Assign Coupon to User; links the coupon to the request

actions.label: Reject
actions.effect: status -> Rejected; stamps declined_at; stores reason in decline_reason

actions.label: Close task
actions.effect: status -> Closed (this is the portal's 'Close task' button); reason is passed to the flow
